name: Erich Hartmann
longDesc: Erich Hartmann est un général aérienne de qualité or — Allemagne. Données extraites du jeu — descriptions et conseils tactiques à confirmer.

skills.name: Eagle Fly
skills.desc: Boosts X% dodge rate and 4 mobility when commanding an air hover unit, and decreases 30% taken damage from air forces. Boost critical strike damage 1% based on 1% dodge rate when air hovering units attack.

skills.name: Airforce Leader
skills.desc: X% chance to give the enemy a critical attack when commanding air units

skills.name: Carpet Bombing
skills.desc: Damage +X% to the defending forces in the city when air-raiding

skills.name: Fluke
skills.desc: When commanded troop activates dodge, restore X% based on self's maximum HP (up to 1 time per turn)

skills.name: Inferior Victory
skills.desc: Damage is increased by X% when the number of troop formations under command is 1.

sources: Données extraites de l'APK World Conqueror 4
